notes: Iteration #88: V12 — drop ETH, soften ATR stop from -2.5 to -3.5 ATR, remove regime filter.
V11 arc: BTC+ETH with regime filter + 2.5 ATR stop regressed (2/4 OOS, mean -0.90) because regime filter calibration was wrong and ETH dragged the portfolio.
V12 hypothesis: BTC is the alpha carrier. Drop ETH, drop regime filter, keep entry-anchored ATR stop at -3.5 ATR (V10 logic + softer breathing room).
Hard user gates G1-G7 deferred (single-strategy hypothesis test, not a ship candidate).
Fees follow V10/V11 convention (1bps/side, 1bps slip) for apples-to-apples.
